1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/cb742e3f-6f61-4f9e-9904-64fa854875bc" style="width: 830px; height: 438px; left: 0px; top: -438p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/cb742e3f-6f61-4f9e-9904-64fa854875bc" style="width: 830px; height: 438px; left: 0px; top: -438p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (136 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

MODERATE

Form input has no label

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/4b404f53-e35d-47d7-857b-9e5bb5705847" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/4b404f53-e35d-47d7-857b-9e5bb5705847" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (133 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s

MODERATE

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/d8cca521-a1d3-4caa-b4de-edd987f282d2" style="width: 747px; height: 560px; left: 0px; top: -560p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/d8cca521-a1d3-4caa-b4de-edd987f282d2" style="width: 747px; height: 560px; left: 0px; top: -560p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (136 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Hopp over navigeringen</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Logg på</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope yt-formatted-string" dir="auto" href="https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/95725" rel="nofollow" spellcheck="false" target="_blank">Finn ut mer</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="ytp-title-channel-name" href="" target="_blank"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="i0" aria-expanded="true" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" class="ytSearchboxComponentInput yt-searchbox-input title" name="search_query" placeholder=
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" size="20"> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><template is="dom-if"></template></ps-dom-if> <option class="style-scope
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.7 Synlig fokus (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.7 (2.4.7 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Element has outline:none which may hide focus indicator

<tp-yt-paper-dialog aria-labelledby="cb-header" aria-modal="true" class="eom-v1-dialog style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" id="dialog" modal="" role="dia
Provide alternative focus styling if removing default outline
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" frosted-glass="" mini-guide-visible="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_styles:v

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['ps-dom-repeat']

<ul class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <li class="icon-li style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <yt-icon class="item-icon style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><!--css-build:sh

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<ul class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <li class="icon-li style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <yt-icon class="item-icon style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><!--css-build:sh

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="i1" aria-expanded="true" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" class="ytSearchboxComponentInput yt-searchbox-input title" name="search_query" placeholder=
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" size="20"> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><template is="dom-if"></template></ps-dom-if> <option class="style-scope
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/30f3e61b-3ea2-4736-94b7-b4868cb625ed" style="width: 976px; height: 549px; left: 0px; top: -549p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/30f3e61b-3ea2-4736-94b7-b4868cb625ed" style="width: 976px; height: 549px; left: 0px; top: -549p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (149 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Hopp over navigeringen</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Logg på</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<div class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" id="player-container" role="complementary" style="touch-action: auto;"> <dom-if class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"><template is="dom-if"></template></dom-if>
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

CRITICAL

<input aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="i1" aria-expanded="true" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" class="ytSearchboxComponentInput yt-searchbox-input title" name="search_query" placeholder=

Form input has no label

<select class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" size="20"> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><template is="dom-if"></template></ps-dom-if> <option class="style-scope

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/8d9a9ccf-4439-4f7f-83fe-c5e8cb2b1f97" style="width: 976px; height: 549px; left: 0px; top: -549p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>

Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a aria-selected="true" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope yt-dropdown-menu iron-selected" tabindex="0"> <tp-yt-paper-item aria-disabled="false" class="style-scope yt-dropdown-menu" role="option" s
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-disabled="false" aria-keyshortcuts="SHIFT+n" aria-label="Neste (SHIFT+n)" class="ytp-next-button ytp-button ytp-playlist-ui" data-preview="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/v8q_9QdZquc/hqdefault.jpg?v=ab
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<a aria-label="" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-topbar-logo-renderer" href="/" id="logo" title="Startside for YouTube"> <div class="style-scope ytd-topbar-logo-renderer"> <ytd-logo class="s
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Les dette før du går videre til YouTube

https://consent.youtube.com/ml?continue=https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkYwFFxv59vWBZtf707mGfA/about?cbrd%3D1&gl=NO&hl=no&cm=2&pc=yt&src=1&escs=AZ8E49BzwcsmdTE2vbEyskkbU5Ab2ychNhkl5wAf2icrd_8uWkmfExXpZH6Hlb__5ROC0x2CyfpGBbkSuVCgwJIHb-7fDddupfBI
Avvik: 7 | Bestått: 16
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="signInIcon" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 1c4.96 0 9 4.04 9 9
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/3755abd8-4929-4540-a4b7-b6031777e4f5" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/3755abd8-4929-4540-a4b7-b6031777e4f5" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (150 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Hopp over navigeringen</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Logg på</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<div class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy" id="player-container" role="complementary" style="touch-action: auto;"> <dom-if class="style-scope ytd-watch-flexy"><template is="dom-if"></template></dom-if>
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til nettstedet'

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/AboveMedia.as" id="invalid-token-redirect-goto-site-button" role="button">Gå til nettstedet</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.1.1 Språk på siden (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.1.1 (3.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Page is missing language declaration

<ul class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <li class="icon-li style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"> <yt-icon class="item-icon style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><!--css-build:sh
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="i1" aria-expanded="true" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" class="ytSearchboxComponentInput yt-searchbox-input title" name="search_query" placeholder=
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" size="20"> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><template is="dom-if"></template></ps-dom-if> <option class="style-scope
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/f022a25d-3302-4971-897e-e5fc5b736170" style="width: 976px; height: 549px; left: 0px; top: -549p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/f022a25d-3302-4971-897e-e5fc5b736170" style="width: 976px; height: 549px; left: 0px; top: -549p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (136 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/37fc8dcb-cff5-4211-baa6-c79369a32483" style="width: 784px; height: 441px; left: 0px; top: -441p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/37fc8dcb-cff5-4211-baa6-c79369a32483" style="width: 784px; height: 441px; left: 0px; top: -441p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (149 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Hopp over navigeringen</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Logg på</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

<a aria-disabled="false" aria-haspopup="false" class="yt-spec-button-shape-next yt-spec-button-shape-next--outline yt-spec-button-shape-next--mono yt-spec-button-shape-next--size-m yt-spec-button-shap
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="i1" aria-expanded="true" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" class="ytSearchboxComponentInput yt-searchbox-input title" name="search_query" placeholder=
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox" size="20"> <ps-dom-if class="style-scope ytd-consent-bump-v2-lightbox"><template is="dom-if"></template></ps-dom-if> <option class="style-scope
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.4.7 Synlig fokus (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.7 (2.4.7 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Element has outline:none which may hide focus indicator

<tp-yt-iron-dropdown aria-disabled="false" aria-hidden="true" class="style-scope tp-yt-paper-menu-button" horizontal-align="left" id="dropdown" style="outline: none; display: none;" vertical-align="to
Provide alternative focus styling if removing default outline

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/dd45b897-3ee8-44f0-8f4c-eede119502e9" style="width: 830px; height: 415px; left: 0px; top: -415p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>

SERIOUS

Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

iframe is missing title attribute

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/f9609961-b835-4505-9d95-06e4718f42d4" style="width: 806px; height: 453px; left: 0px; top: -453p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/f9609961-b835-4505-9d95-06e4718f42d4" style="width: 806px; height: 453px; left: 0px; top: -453p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (153 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Hopp over navigeringen</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Invalid ARIA role: 'text'

<span class="yt-core-attributed-string yt-core-attributed-string--white-space-no-wrap" role="text" style="">Logg på</span>
Use a valid ARIA role from the specification
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<tp-yt-app-drawer align="start" class="style-scope ytd-app" id="guide" position="left" role="navigation" style="transition-duration: 200ms; touch-action: pan-y;" swipe-open=""><!--css-build:shady--><!
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<ytd-mini-guide-renderer class="style-scope ytd-app" disable-upgrade="" frosted-glass="" hidden="" role="navigation"><!--css-build:shady--><!--css_build_scope:ytd-mini-guide-renderer--><!--css_build_s
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Avvik: 6 | Bestått: 9
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til nettstedet'

<a href="http://www.instagram.com/above_media" id="invalid-token-redirect-goto-site-button" role="button">Gå til nettstedet</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.1.1 Språk på siden (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.1.1 (3.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Page is missing language declaration

<html><head><link href="https://www.youtube.com/img/favicon.ico" rel="shortcut icon" type="image/x-i
Add lang attribute to <html> element (e.g., lang='nb' for Norwegian Bokmål)
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/8c1769d9-33bd-4acc-b384-5a06ecbde532" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/8c1769d9-33bd-4acc-b384-5a06ecbde532" style="width: 830px; height: 467px; left: 0px; top: -467p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (140 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/ceee713f-dd7d-4789-bc22-6c3fa548d19a" style="width: 806px; height: 453px; left: 0px; top: -453p
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video class="video-stream html5-main-video" controlslist="nodownload" src="blob:https://www.youtube.com/ceee713f-dd7d-4789-bc22-6c3fa548d19a" style="width: 806px; height: 453px; left: 0px; top: -453p
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (130 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe name="passive_signin" src="https://accounts.google.com/ServiceLogin?service=youtube&uilel=3&passive=true&continue=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsignin%3Faction_handle_signin%3Dtr
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe sandbox="allow-same-origin" src="about:blank" style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a aria-selected="true" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope yt-dropdown-menu iron-selected" tabindex="0"> <tp-yt-paper-item aria-disabled="false" class="style-scope yt-dropdown-menu" role="option" s
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-disabled="false" aria-keyshortcuts="SHIFT+n" aria-label="Neste (SHIFT+n)" class="ytp-next-button ytp-button ytp-playlist-ui" data-preview="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/v8q_9QdZquc/hqdefault.jpg?v=ab
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<a aria-label="" class="yt-simple-endpoint style-scope ytd-topbar-logo-renderer" href="/" id="logo" title="Startside for YouTube"> <div class="style-scope ytd-topbar-logo-renderer"> <ytd-logo class="s
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://olympiaparken.no/lysgardsbakkene
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://olympiaparken.no/lysgardsbakkene --max-pages 16 --format html
